organ_policy: No T-ORG-21/T-ORG-22 created. Transfer completeness/source precedence distributed between T-ORG-20, ORG-RECOVERY, ORG-ARTIFACT, ORG-COMPLETION, ORG-FORMAT.

checks.philosophical_logical_sequence: PASS - calculation center remains base core or explicit layer center; transfer memory is subordinate to physiology; operator questions precede calculation without becoming debts.
checks.self_closure: PASS - package has package_role, active_source_order, core/physiology, state schema fields, manifest/hashes/QA, rollback path, and source boundary.
checks.anti_bureaucracy: PASS - zero new organs; new duties are placed in existing owners; added rules have defects, owners, tests, and lower maintenance cost than adding organs.
checks.author_support: PASS - trigger repaired for first greeting, physiology archives, #50 transition package, and every downloadable BOIS product/archive.
checks.bare_archive_boundary: PASS - bare archive defined as physiology without memory but with formation/QA tools; full state is personal Self versions plus project archives with domain memory.
